verdict.headline: Do not transact — this wallet is on the OFAC SDN sanctions list (Tornado Cash).
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions check returned a confirmed match against OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash designations, which is a hard veto under the policy and overrides all other signals. The on-chain history shows a zero-balance wallet with no compensating positive evidence, and labels/web_sentiment endpoints returned no exonerating data. Sending funds to this address would likely constitute a sanctions violation and must be avoided absent a regulatory-approved exception.

findings.finding: Confirmed sanctions match on OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash designations — hard veto.
No substantive labels returned (labeler API metadata only); no exonerating identity such as exchange/protocol.
Wallet currently holds 0 ETH; no positive history signal to offset sanctions risk.
No specific web reputation hits returned (only API metadata); does not mitigate sanctions exposure.

Resource 1 is the only labels candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate, making it the clear choice on the strongest signal despite having 1/3 input completeness shared by all candidates.
Resource 1 is the only onchain_history candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate combined with higher inputInfoCompleteness (2/3), making it the standout pick.

Resource 2 has a confirmed 0% failure rate (ruling out resource 1 at 100%), and its description of a 0–100 risk/reputation score best matches web_sentiment intent; resource 0 is also 0% but describes blockchain risk rather than reputation/sentiment signals.
